_comment_2: Captured against R-2.0 ship build output. Pre-R-2.0 baseline at R-1.5 commit 164173f preserved as _previous_baseline below for delta tracking.
_comment_4: Update this fixture with a justification in the commit message when intentional bundle growth lands. Spec 11 fails if any non-runtime-editor chunk grows by more than 5%.
_comment_5: Runtime-editor chunks (RuntimeEditorShell, TenantUserPicker, RuntimeHostTestPage, TenantRouteTree) are excluded — they're EXPECTED to change as R-2+ phases land.
_comment_6: R-2.0 growth: entity-card click-to-edit (DeliveryCard / AncillaryCard / OrderCard registrations + Path 1 wrapping at registrations/entity-cards.ts) increases the main bundle by ~7.3 KB (5,521,976 → 5,529,237 bytes, +0.13%). Intentional architectural growth, not regression. Subsequent R-N work that registers further entity types (R-2.1 entity-card sub-sections, R-3+ widgets, R-4 buttons) will continue to grow this baseline proportionally; reset the fixture each phase that crosses the +5% tolerance.

main_bundle.description: Tenant + admin app entry — combined ChunkA bundle that all routes depend on. R-2.0 +0.13% over R-1.5 baseline (entity-card registrations).

css.description: Compiled Tailwind v4 + DESIGN_LANGUAGE.md token surface. R-2.0 -2.15% from R-1.5 baseline (Tailwind purge produces smaller output post-render-site rewrites).

chart_renderer.description: Lazy-loaded recharts wrapper for SavedView chart variants. R-2.0 -2.34% from R-1.5 baseline (unrelated to entity-cards; recharts internal optimization or tree-shake improvement).
